name: edge-audit
description: Loop-engineer an edge-vs-luck audit until checklist criteria clear

steps.text: Fooled by Randomness protocol: guilty of luck until large OOS evidence says otherwise.

steps.goal: Audit the user's strategy or streak claim under edge-vs-luck skill. Assume luck until proven otherwise. Deliver verdict first, gates table, and what evidence would change the mind. Do not invent trade data — mark missing inputs as insufficient evidence.
criteria: Verdict is one of: Insufficient evidence, Consistent with luck/overfitting, Provisional edge, Not proven
Sample size and out-of-sample status are stated honestly
Survivorship and costs are addressed or flagged unknown
What would change the mind is specific (N, OOS, costs)
One concrete risk of believing the narrative now
